assertions.expectation: Recommends combining release channels with maintenance exclusions as the approach for maximum control
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends 'Extended Channel + "No Minor or Node" Exclusion' as the main approach and shows how to combine them with gcloud commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion to prevent disruptive changes while allowing control plane security patches. May also mention persistent exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support (no longer a 6-month max, auto-tracks EoS)
assertions.reason: The response specifically recommends --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and includes --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support in the command example, explaining it auto-tracks End of Support

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance windows to control WHEN patches are applied (e.g., weekend windows only)
assertions.reason: The response includes maintenance window configuration with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration, and --maintenance-window-recurrence for Saturday 2-6 AM windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions the cluster disruption budget (disruption interval) to control upgrade frequency — patch interval default 7d (max 90d), minor interval default 30d (max 90d)
assertions.reason: The response includes --maintenance-patch-version-disruption-interval=7776000s (90 days) in the command and mentions limiting patch frequency to quarterly

assertions.expectation: Suggests Stable or Extended channel for production clusters in regulated environments. Extended channel provides maximum flexibility around EoS enforcement (additional cost only during extended period)
assertions.reason: The response recommends Extended channel as primary choice and mentions Regular channel as alternative, explains 24-month support, and notes cost only during extended support period (months 15-24)

assertions.expectation: Notes that disabling control plane patches entirely is not recommended due to security risks — monthly patches at minimum
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states that security patches are automatically applied to the control plane and warns against 'No upgrades' exclusions that block security patches, emphasizing maintaining security posture

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for controlling upgrade order across multiple clusters, and/or the cluster disruption budget for controlling CP patch frequency
assertions.reason: The response mentions both: includes cluster disruption budget (patch interval) in the main configuration and discusses rollout sequencing in the 'Multi-Cluster Fleet Strategy' section with gcloud container fleet clusterupgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for configuring the recommended exclusion type and maintenance window
assertions.reason: The response provides multiple detailed gcloud commands including cluster update with exclusion scope, maintenance windows, and alternative configurations
